name: Sampath Suresh Babu
description: Runs the business and creative strategy—client direction, marketing, product vision, and the big-picture thinking. Fluent in Figma, Canva, Shopify, and WordPress, with hands-on MERN and Next.js experience. He sees opportunities before anyone else does.

name: Basim Rauf
description: 5 years of professional web development bringing flawless execution to life. Deep expertise in MEAN/MERN stack and backend architecture. A perfectionist who never cuts corners—point him in the right direction and he'll deliver something better than you imagined, on time, every time.
